payload.answer: I could not verify the article because the fetch failed with a 404 network error, so I did not store a durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The source could not be fetched, so there is insufficient evidence to resolve or create a durable entity for the article.

memory_cards.statement: A request was made to remember an article at https://example.com/missing for the reason "useful for memory architecture," but the mock fetch returned a 404 network error, so no article content was available to store.

details: Only an ephemeral failure note was recorded.

repair_options: Provide a working URL or pasted article text so it can be fetched and evaluated.
If the article has moved, share the new location or a copy of the content.
Retry later if the 404 was temporary, then re-run memory ingestion.
